---
title: "Photo Gallery"
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="photo-grid">

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Yair_naquaWindsow_2026.jpg" alt="n-aqua workshop (Windsor 2026)">
    <p>Naqua workshop, Windsor 2026</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Yair_aerosol_2026.jpg" alt="Chemical reactivity on droplets and air/water interface (Shanghai, 2026)">
    <p>Chemical reactivity on droplets and air/water interface (Shanghai, 2026)</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Yair_simplaix.JPG" alt="Simplaix Workshop (Heidelberg 2026)">
    <p>Simplaix Workshop (Heidelberg 2026)</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Yair_simplaix2.JPG" alt="Simplaix Workshop (Heidelberg 2026)">
    <p>Simplaix Workshop (Heidelberg 2026)</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Stream_May-2025.jpg" alt="STREAM group May 2025">
    <p>STREAM group, May 2025</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Stream_May-2025b.jpg" alt="STREAM group May 2025" style="object-position: top;">
    <p>STREAM group, May 2025</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Yair_2.jpg" alt="Evidence that theory can be fun">
    <p>Evidence that theory can be fun</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Psi-k%202025.jpg" alt="Psi-k 2025 Conference (Lausanne 2025)">
    <p>Psi-k 2025 Conference (Lausanne 2025)</p>
  </div>

  <div class="photo-item">
    <img src="../photos_gallery/Yair_1.jpg" alt="Yair at the interface between confusion and insight">
    <p>Yair at "At the interface between confusion and insight"</p>
  </div>

</div>
```
